Previously disposed of waste stream introduced into recycle stream.

All methanol fumes from the process are captured by local exhaust ventilation.  No waste is generated from this process.  No disposal of methanol is done.

Able to get more material in recycling facility.
Reject rates influence this reportable value.

Variance for disposal relates to recyclers ability to accept materials. On occasion, the receiver is not able to receive and recycle material in relation to our needs (i.e. we need to ship material and receiver is booked/not accepting material).

Variance for recycling relates to recyclers ability to accept materials. On occasion, the receiver is not able to receive and recycle material in relation to our needs (i.e. we need to ship material and receiver is booked/not accepting material).
Reject rates influence this reportable value.
